personal.name: Berton Quon
personal.title: Software Developer
personal.bio: Full-stack developer focused on creating clean and valuable solutions. Passionate about modern web technologies and solving complex problems.

description: Contributed to the core functionalities of a multi-million dollar SaaS platform for gas pipeline integrity serving over 25 million households.
Automated data processing pipelines, reducing manual work and minimizing errors.
Led development of key features and mentored junior developers.
Collaborated with product and design teams to ship customer-facing improvements.
Improved application performance by identifying and resolving bottlenecks.

projects.title: Mahjong Game
projects.description: Web based Mahjong game built with JavaScript and React. It features a responsive design, smooth animations, and an intuitive user interface.

projects.title: EventFull
projects.description: Capstone project: a full stack project built with Java Spring Boot and React. It allows users to create and manage events, with features like user authentication, event creation, mobile ticket check in, and real-time updates.
